must_detect.matched_text: Issuer disclosure context: the acquisition of PT BetaPay Digital was announced via OJK e-Reporting and BEI website on 02 Feb 2026; no pre-announcement data is attached or transferred under this schedule.

Schedule 2 – Data Handling Controls (Indonesia) to the DPA between PT Nusantara Quantum Finance Tbk and CloudOrbit Asia Sdn. Bhd. (inactive integration).
Scope: recruitment/onboarding forms, employment records, and limited fintech customer service logs used for OJK/BEI disclosure workflows; this note does not contain material non-public information and references only facts previously disclosed on IDX e-Disclosure.
PII per UU PDP is processed as controller by the Perseroan and as processor by CloudOrbit; categories include identification, contact, and job suitability data collected via standard forms, with minimisation applied to optional fields.
Minimisation: CV photo fields and birthdate are optional; KTP/NPWP labels remain on forms but values, if provided, are salted-hash at source and truncated in exports.
Retention: recruitment files are set to 24 months then erasure; employment payroll metadata follows a 5-year schedule; no scheduled retention expiry falls in this quarter.
Cross-border transfer: disabled by default for HR data; no live transfer to CloudOrbit or any non-Indonesia location is currently active under this agreement.
Data export approvals: any future reactivation requires Controller sign-off, a Transfer Impact Assessment, and ASEAN Model Clauses; approvals expire after 12 months if unused.
Consent withdrawal: candidates may withdraw consent via the portal; as of this memo there are zero pending withdrawals and the workflow is functioning as designed.
DSAR: all prior requests have been closed; DSAR-2190 (12 Apr 2026) was fulfilled with partial erasure of access logs for a former contractor consistent with legal basis and audit retention.
Erasure execution for DSAR-2190: biometric access logs older than 90 days were deleted; immutable payroll ledgers were redacted rather than deleted due to statutory retention.
Security and access: processor access is role-based and logged; no privileged access tokens are provisioned while cross-border transfer remains off.
Issuer disclosure context: the acquisition of PT BetaPay Digital was announced via OJK e-Reporting and BEI website on 02 Feb 2026; no pre-announcement data is attached or transferred under this schedule.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
